title: Higashi Asia Bunka Toshi 2019 Toshima
titleNative: 東アジア文化都市2019豊島
synonyms: Culture City of East Asia 2019 Toshima
synopsis: Higashi Asia Buka Toshi is a yearly event in agreement with Japan, China, and Korea's cultural ministries. A city or ward from each country is chosen to bring awareness to that city through its arts and culture. For 2019, Japan selected its Toshima ward of Tokyo city. This means that Toshima is now accepting any projects, logos, public relations, school projects, etc. among the Toshima citizens and businesses to create a Toshima-portfolio and tourism for the ward. To mark the debut of Toshima's selection, a rotoscoped short was released following a little girl's view of Toshima's attractions.

tags.name: Rotoscoping
tags.description: Animation technique that animators use to trace over motion picture footage, frame by frame, to produce realistic action.

title: Coffee Ikaga Deshou
titleNative: 珈琲いかがでしょう
synopsis: The story follows a coffee food truck shop, where the barista makes an individual cup for each customer. The coffee brewed conscientiously, sincerely, and wholeheartedly helps customers unwind. (Source: Anime News Network)

titleNative: ぷちきゅあ～Precure Fairies～ シーズン２

In a Strange Paradise entirely made up of sweets, everyone goes on a candy-eating spree!? Many more heartwarming and cute PetitCure stories that'll make you smile and feel all warm inside await ♡ (Source: Official Website News, translated, edited)

title: Sanchoume no Yuuhi
titleNative: 三丁目の夕日
synopsis: The anime is set in postwar Japan between 1955 and 1964 and focuses on stories illustrating the humour and pathos of ordinary life in Japan of that era, mainly about the residents of the fictional Tokyo neighbourhood called San Choume (Third District).

titleNative: どろろんぱっ！

Komachi appears in the room of a young girl named Anko and the two get wrapped up in all sorts of adventures involving other ghosts and demons. (Source: TV Asahi)

title: Mantou Riji
titleNative: 馒头日记
synopsis: Sweet and innocent orphan Man Tou, while optimistic and tough in his own way, often feels lonely deep inside. Without the care of parents, he longs for love more than anyone else. Being ridiculed and bullied by others as the parentless child, he longs for a genuine friendship that is yet to come. Though uncertain where his future lies, Man Tou has faith that keeps on working hard and never stops giving love will find him that place he can call home. (Source: u17)
